ns0:entry.ns0:title: BerriAI/litellm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm
Language: python
Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FareedKhan-dev/train-llm-from-scratch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FareedKhan-dev/train-llm-from-scratch
Language: python
A straightforward method for training your LLM, from downloading data to generating text.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LLMQuant/quant-mind
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LLMQuant/quant-mind
Language: python
QuantMind is an intelligent knowledge extraction and retrieval framework for quantitative finance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/SkillSpector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/SkillSpector
Language: python
Security scanner for AI agent skills. Detect vulnerabilities, malicious patterns, and security risks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sumanth077/Hands-On-AI-Engineering
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sumanth077/Hands-On-AI-Engineering
Language: python
A curated collection of practical AI projects implementing OCR systems, RAG, AI agents, and other AI use cases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alistaitsacle/free-llm-api-keys
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alistaitsacle/free-llm-api-keys
Language: python
Free LLM API keys for GPT-5.5, Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok — copy, paste, use. Updated 3-5x daily. No credit card needed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-plugins-official
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official
Language: python
Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: francescopace/espectre
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/francescopace/espectre
Language: python
🛜 ESPectre 👻 - Motion detection system based on Wi-Fi spectre analysis (CSI), with Home Assistant integration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hexo-ai/sia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hexo-ai/sia
Language: python
SIA is a Self Improving AI framework to autonomously improve the performance of any AI system (Model / Agent) on a benchmark task.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: karpathy/autoresearch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/karpathy/autoresearch
Language: python
AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mlflow/mlflow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mlflow/mlflow
Language: python
The open source AI engineering platform for agents, LLMs, and ML models. MLflow enables teams of all sizes to debug, evaluate, monitor, and optimize production-quality AI applications while controlling costs and managing access to models and data.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelscope/FunASR
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelscope/FunASR
Language: python
Industrial-grade speech recognition toolkit: 170x realtime, 50+ languages, speaker diarization, emotion detection, streaming, and OpenAI-compatible API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill
Language: python
AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

ns0:entry.ns0:title: onyx-dot-app/onyx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/onyx-dot-app/onyx
Language: python
Open Source AI Platform - AI Chat with advanced features that works with every LLM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: soxoj/maigret
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/soxoj/maigret
Language: python
🕵️‍♂️ Collect a dossier on a person by username from 3000+ sites

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zulip/zulip
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zulip/zulip
Language: python
Zulip server and web application. Open-source team chat that helps teams stay productive and focused.
